AFM Asst. Prof. Arwin Datumaya Wahyudi Sumari

Air First Marshal Asst. Prof. Dr. Ir. ARWIN DATUMAYA WAHYUDI SUMARI, S.T., M.T., IPU, ASEAN Eng., ACPE, APEC Eng., FSI, FSME, VDBM, SA, S.R. Eng. is an Air Force High-ranking Officer who graduated from the Indonesian Air Force (IDAF) Academy with the Adi Makayasa medal as the Best Academy Graduate, Trophy for being the Best Majoring Graduate of the Department of Electronics in 1991, and the Recipient of the Outstanding Officer Award from the Chief of Staff of IDAF in 1996. He holds a series of academic achievements, including a B. Eng. in Electrical Engineering (1996), an M. Eng. in Electrical Engineering (2008), and a Dr. in Electrical Engineering and Informatics (2010), all from the Institut Teknologi Bandung, Indonesia, each earned with Cum Laude honors. He has passed all military education from the Electronics Officer Branch School, the Air Force Unit Command School, and the Air Force Staff and Command School as well as the recipient of the best individual writing award "Sastratama".

He is also a graduate of the Elliot's School of International Affairs, George Washington University and the Naval Postgraduate School (NPS), USA. His diverse roles encompass heading the Cognitive Artificial Intelligence Research Group (CAIRG), co-founding and serving on the Board of Supervisory of the Indonesia Artificial Intelligence Society (IAIS), and active membership in the Indonesia Cyber Security Forum (ICSF), Smart Indonesia Initiative Association, Indonesia Smart Grid Initiative, and Neuronesia as Senior Member. He is also an Member of the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) since 2023.
‍
He has published more than 400 articles, and keynote speakers at government and non-government agencies, achieved Best Paper Award at home and abroad, has four granted patents and eight registered patents on Knowledge Growing System (KGS) and other technologies, and 77 copyrights on Artificial Intelligence applications and related. His research interests span cognitive artificial intelligence, machine learning, information fusion, pattern recognition, data science and engineering, cybersecurity, and defense technology. He also holds various national and international professional certificates, including Professional Engineer in electrical engineering and flight simulator. He was Rector of the Adisutjipto Institute of Aerospace Technology (ITD Adisutjipto) between 2022-2024 and was the Head of Defense Economic Study Program at Republic of Indonesia Defense University between 2013-2015.
‍
Under his leadership, the ITD Adisutjipto has successfully won the Silver Award for the Key Performance Index in the Private Higher Education category in 2024 from the Ministry of Education, Science, and Technology. He is the Winner of the Best Data and AI Technology 2024 award in the field of Cognitive Artificial Intelligence from Association of Big Data and Artificial Intelligence (ABDI).
‍
Currently, he serves as the Special Staff to the Chief of Staff of the Indonesian Air Force and has been an Adjunct Professor at the State Polytechnic of Malang, Indonesia since 2019.
